description: An aerial photograph showing the tail of a hydropower lake in the Euphrates river, near Kasaba, Turkey. The image was captured by the SPOT 5 satellite on 2011-05-07, using a 1/2/3 band combination with a spatial resolution of 2.5 metres. It depicts a pale green/light brown water body nestled between steep, dark, rocky mountain slopes. A dam structure is visible in the upper background. Red dashed lines are manually overlaid along the visible water's edge, highlighting the current water level for delineation purposes, consistent with Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) guidelines for water body classification.
